Program_Description: The WIC program provides nutritional support and education for women, infants, and children.
Target_Population: Low-income pregnant, postpartum, and breastfeeding women; infants and children

Program_Description: Medi-Cal provides prenatal and pregnancy coverage for eligible individuals.
The Sacramento County WIC program helps pregnant women, new moms, and young children eat well, stay healthy, and be active.
Target_Population: Low-income pregnant, postpartum, and breastfeeding women; infants and children.
Eligibility_Requirements: You are pregnant now or within the last six months and/or you have a child under the age of five years.

Program_Description: Medi-Cal for Kids & Teens provides free services to keep your child healthy from birth to age 21.
Application_Process: Call toll-free at 1-866-850-4321 to make an appointment
